source: Citizen Lab — Graphite Caught: First Forensic Confirmation of Paragon's iOS Mercenary Spyware (2025)
note: Citizen Lab's iOS confirmation relied on server-side network fingerprinting and an attacker iMessage account in device logs (delivered via CVE-2025-43200, fixed in iOS 18.3.1) rather than an on-device process name. The single scannable value here is a Graphite server IP; keep iOS updated as the primary defence.

indicators.description: Graphite server matched to Citizen Lab network 'Fingerprint P1'.
